mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.product_tmpl_id AS productTmplId, p.default_code AS defaultCode, p.barcode, p.active FROM product_product p LEFT JOIN product_template pt ON pt.id = p.product_tmpl_id
AND ( p.default_code ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR p.barcode ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR pt.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') )
AND p.default_code ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.defaultCode}, '%')
AND p.barcode ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.barcode}, '%')
AND p.product_tmpl_id = #{query.productTmplId}
AND pt.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.productTmplName}, '%')
AND p.active = #{query.active}
ORDER BY p.id DESC
